rationale: Gov't Code §2001.085 governs written evidence in contested-case hearings. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b); no conflict arises.
quote: Subject to the requirements of Sections 2001.081 through 2001.084, any part of the evidence in a contested case may be received in writing
_note: Rule text concerns administrative hearing procedure; proposed change concerns property tax exemption. No overlap.
